title: Al Quway‘īyah Heat Wave
lead: Al Quway‘īyah is experiencing a critical heat wave with a Z-Score of +4.86. This extreme weather event has reached a score of 10.0/10, indicating severe conditions.
body:
The current heat wave in Al Quway‘īyah has resulted in extremely high temperatures, with a Cooling Degree Days (CDD) value of 16.0 GG. 
 The relative humidity is very low at 11%, and the wind speed is moderate at 7.5 km/h. 
 The lack of rainfall and high temperatures will exacerbate the heat wave, posing a significant threat to the local population and infrastructure.
conclusion: Implement emergency measures to mitigate the effects of the heat wave immediately.
